outcome: Build a proof-of-concept AI finance chat app over QuickBooks for a prospective customer demo: a chat UI over live QuickBooks data, a branded monthly report, and a deterministic forecast.
successCriteria: Chat UI renders live QuickBooks data in a branded, demo-ready interface
Monthly report copy reads in the customer's brand voice, humanizer-clean of AI-tells
Forecast is deterministic: identical inputs reproduce identical numbers
QBO OAuth flow completes against a live sandbox account, verified not mocked

crew.rationale: Decompose the POC into schema, chat UI, branded report, and QBO OAuth slices.
Build the Supabase schema/migration and the QBO OAuth integration.
Build the Next.js chat UI page over live QuickBooks data.
Strip AI-tell phrasing from the customer-facing branded report before the demo.
QBO OAuth tokens and live financial data access are security-critical.
Final adversarial review across the schema/UI/copy/OAuth slices.

recommendations: skill-gap for ai-sdk: no installed skill in this inventory covers the Vercel AI SDK chat-streaming pattern this task needs — author one via superpowers:writing-skills, or install the vercel/next.js marketplace's ai-sdk skill before the chat UI task starts.
degradations: skill-gap: ai-sdk — no installed/builtin skill covers this

plan.task: Design and apply the Supabase schema/migration for chat sessions, forecast snapshots, and QBO OAuth tokens.

skills.rationale: This task owns the chat/forecast/OAuth-token tables Supabase will serve and enforce RLS on.

plan.task: Build the chat UI page over live QuickBooks data using Next.js and shadcn components.

skills.rationale: The chat page is a Next.js App Router route rendering the live-data stream.
Chat UI composes shadcn primitives (message list, input, cards) for the branded look.
Customer-facing chat UI needs a dedicated design pass before the demo, not just component wiring.
skills.evidence: task surface=ui; task text: "chat UI page"

plan.task: Write the branded monthly report copy the customer will read live during the demo, in their brand voice.

skills.rationale: The branded report is customer-facing prose read live in a sales demo — any AI-tell phrasing undermines the pitch.
skills.evidence: task surface=copy; task text: "branded monthly report copy"

plan.task: Implement the QuickBooks (QBO) OAuth integration pulling live financial data for the chat and report.

skills.rationale: An OAuth-plus-live-data integration claim must be verified against a real QBO sandbox call, not asserted from reading the code.
skills.evidence: task surface=integration; task text: "QuickBooks (QBO) OAuth integration"
